items.title: Worshippers in Istanbul react after Pope Leo takes part in ceremony with Patriarch Bartholomew
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Worshippers have hailed Pope Leo XIV's visit to Turkey after he held a divine liturgy with Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew in Istanbul on Sunday in a gesture of support for Christian unity.

items.title: Bodies carried away after deadly Hong Kong fire claims 128 lives and sparks safety crackdown
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>With dozens of people still unaccounted for, rescue teams in Hong Kong continued to search the ruins of eight buildings that went up in flames last week, killing at least 128 people in one of the city's deadliest blazes. (AP video by Ayaka McGill)

items.title: Emergency teams respond after Russian strike on Vyshgorod, Kyiv region
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Local authorities reported one person killed and 11 injured following a Russian strike on Kyiv's northern satellite of Vyshgorod. 146 people have been evacuated from a high-rise building with rescue efforts continuing through the night.

items.title: Behind the scenes as Pope Leo XIV visits Istanbul's Blue Mosque in Turkey
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Pope Leo XIV started the second day of his trip to Turkey with a visit to Istanbul’s Blue Mosque on Saturday. Leo was following in the footsteps of his recent predecessors, who all made high-profile visits to the mosque in a gesture of respect to Turkey’s Muslim majority.

items.title: Law enforcement on scene after shooting in Stockton leaves 4 dead, 10 wounded
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Four people were killed and 10 wounded in a shooting during a family gathering at a banquet hall in Stockton, sheriff’s officials said Saturday. The victims included both children and adults, said Heather Brent, a spokesperson for the San Joaquin County sheriff’s office. Early indications “suggest this may have been a targeted incident,” Brent said during a news conference at the scene.

#california #news

items.title: LIVE: Memorial at scene of Hong Kong’s deadliest fire in decades
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live view from Wang Fuk Court complex in Hong Kong's northern suburbs where a fire killed at least 146 people, with flames covering seven of the eight towers. Read more: https://bit.ly/4pCzEmT

items.title: Thousands in Philippines protest corruption and demand return of stolen funds
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Thousands of demonstrators in the Philippines including from the dominant Roman Catholic church clergy protested Sunday, calling for the swift prosecution of top legislators and officials implicated in a corruption scandal that has buffeted the Asian democracy. (AP video by Joeal Calupitan)
